subTable.title: SubTable Demo
subTable.description: Demonstrates SubTable inline edit, modal edit, batch toolbar actions, and FormSchema modal
subTable.resultEmpty: Submit the form to see JSON output here
subTable.featureInline: Inline editing: Input, Select, InputNumber, Switch, etc.
subTable.featureModal: Select rows and use the top Edit button to open the modal
subTable.featureModelProp: Same bindings as form fields: value / checked / fileList
subTable.featureRemark: Remark and attachment columns use editable: false (modal only)
subTable.featureDefaultRow: New row defaults come from a __defaultRow entry in the form field defaultValue, keyed by column fieldName
subTable.featureList: SubTable provides list display only, no inline editing
subTable.featureToolbar: Top toolbar: add, batch edit, batch delete
subTable.featureFormSchema: Modal edit reuses FormSchema and form components (including OosFile)
subTable.featureBatch: Batch edit: empty fields do not overwrite existing values
subTable.featureOosFile: Attachment column uses OosFile; field stores OosFileVO[] directly

fileUpload.title: File Upload Demo
fileUpload.description: Demonstrates kthirty-oos upload, batch upload, and authenticated download
fileUpload.listEmpty: File names appear here after upload; click to download
fileUpload.formHint: The attachments field is OosFileVO[] and can be JSON-serialized into a single business column
